name: agentos-cohort3
description: Sets up and runs a personal AgentOS for business leaders. Initialize a portable operating layer, load its context each session, create scoped agents, design workflows, upgrade older AgentOS folders, and capture durable decisions.

interface.shortDescription: Set up, load, extend, and maintain a personal AgentOS.
interface.longDescription: AgentOS Cohort 3 helps business leaders create a portable operating layer made of plain files, then use Codex to load context, create scoped agents, design repeatable workflows, upgrade existing AgentOS folders, and record durable decisions.
